title: Ubiquiti USL-Motion, UniFi Protect motion sensor
category: IoT, SMART / Smart security / Motion sensors
description: The Ubiquiti USL-Motion is a wireless UniFi Protect sensor designed to detect motion . It communicates with the gateway using the proprietary SuperLink protocol with range of up to 2km (in open space). The sensor can be easily attached using adhesive or screws to a wall and is powered by a CR123A battery (included) with battery life of up to 6 years Device Corner mount Mounting accessories
specsSearch: Wireless features Tx power [dBm] 14 Wireless frequency SuperLink Power Power type Battery Physical characteristics Design On the wall Purpose Indoor LED indication Yes Chassis design Plastic Buttons Reset, sync Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 40 Weight [g] 45 Width [mm] 23 Height [mm] 94 Depth [mm] 25
